$comment: Eval harness CI thresholds. Tunable without code changes. Defaults are strict: any regression fails the gate. When intentionally loosening a threshold (e.g. adding a flaky case), bump the counter in `relaxations` with a reason — reviewers can scan this to see WHY CI accepts what it accepts. See tools/eval-harness/README.md § CI Gate.

static.$tokenBudgets_comment: Hard caps per individual case. Each case's metrics.totalTokens must be <= this for its suite. The Context Contract's STANDARD_BUDGET is 3200 — set here slightly above to catch the runaway before the contract's built-in truncation hides it.

$relaxations: If a relaxation is applied (e.g. minMemoryRecallRate set below 1.0), log it here with date + PR + reason so reviewers can audit what we've accepted.
